ConnectionStrings.//: Set via environment variable or a non-committed appsettings.Production.local.json. Placeholder only.

Security.//: Strong secret used to hash client IPs. Provide via environment variable Security__IpHashSalt.

DataProtection.//: Directory for Data Protection keys (auth cookies + antiforgery). Mapped to a persistent Docker volume so keys survive container recreation/deploys.

SeedAdmin.//: Optional first-run admin bootstrap. Prefer setting via environment variables and removing afterwards.
